---
description: "Create a pull request — prepare a branch, commit changes, and open a PR with a proper description"
agent: "pr-creator"
argument-hint: "Describe the PR title or what changes to include"
---

Create a pull request for the current changes in the Jàngat project.

Check git status, validate the build passes, create a descriptive branch name, write a conventional commit message, and open a PR via `gh pr create` with a clear title and description. Confirm details before creating.
